checks.name: HUD_TEXT
checks.detail: chart text hf p90=6.52 (floor 3.2) — guards 'chart letters illegible'

checks.name: CAPTION_TEXT
checks.detail: caption text hf p90=23.6 (floor 3.2) — guards 'captions generic/hard to read'

checks.name: EVENT_CADENCE
checks.detail: biggest dead gap=0.0s (max 5.0s), dead windows=[] — guards 'boring/too slow'

checks.name: BEAT_DENSITY
checks.detail: 22 distinct visual beats (need >=11, ~1 per 5s) — the picture must keep telling the story, not just move

checks.name: SCENE_STRUCTURE
checks.detail: 6 shots, 5 real transitions, 6 framings — a genuine sequence of shots (config/shot_structure.yaml)

checks.name: READABILITY
checks.detail: 2550 readable words checked, 0 too dim/low-contrast (need vis>=0.42, contrast>=2.0) — guards 'every word bright + legible'

checks.name: MUSIC
checks.detail: music source = sourced ("Long Note Two" Kevin MacLeod (incompetech.com), licensed under CC BY 4.0) — must be a freshly-sourced real track; synth/legacy fails (fix get_music + re-mix)

checks.name: SFX_EVENTS
checks.detail: 15 sound events, 15 verified audible — every shot sonified, events audible in the master (VISUAL_FLOW.md §5)

checks.name: DIMENSIONAL
checks.detail: engine=dimensional scale=1.0 shadow_fn=True arch=cuda — 3D hygiene clean

checks.name: DEPTH_FIELD
checks.detail: median near/far depth spread 19.3 world units over 294 samples (283 above floor) — a real 3D scene, not a flat card (need med>=2.0, 80% >=1.0)

checks.name: CAMERA_MOTION
checks.detail: camera path 28.92 wu, focus travel 27.40 wu, max step 6.1246 — the camera must LIVE (drift at minimum) and either travel or rack (>=0.4 wu)
